content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally across pharma, FMCG, metals, defence, IT, NBFCs and chemicals with multiple held names showing strong intraday gains. Global cues firm (S&P +1.46%, Nasdaq +2.02%). Book is fully deployed across 11 names — priority is trailing SLs on winners and exiting on binary-event names, not new adds.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24500,
      "nifty_resistance": 25200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 1056.70 vs entry 984 = +7.4% gain. SL at 1035 is already above entry (locked-in profit) and sits ~2% below CMP (proper trail-gap). VWAP 1052 holding as intraday support. Bullish Q4, dual broker upgrades. Holding HOLD — emitting MODIFY with same values would be no-op; switching to HOLD via position_actions."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 124.12 vs entry 125.10 = -0.8%. Defensive position, gold rebounding May 6. SL 121 (-2.5% below CMP) appropriate. Hold thesis intact as portfolio hedge."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1735.00,
      "new_target": 1820.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 1757.10 vs entry 1700 = +3.4% gain. Trail SL from 1725 to 1735 (above entry, locks +2% profit, ~1.25% below CMP — meets 1% trail-gap floor). Q4 beat, +25% in last month, breaking out to new 52w high. Target 1820 unchanged."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4575.00,
      "new_target": 4875.00,
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 4630.40 vs entry 4575 = +1.2%. Trail SL from 4540 to 4575 (breakeven). BINARY EVENT WARNING: Q4 results board meeting May 14 (5 sessions away — outside the 3-session window but approaching). Position size ~11% of portfolio (11 sh × 4575 = 50,325). Will reassess on May 11 — if still held into May 13, must trim or tighten further per binary-event rule."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 6960.00,
      "new_target": 7400.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 7049 vs entry 6900 = +2.2% gain. SL already at 6960 (above entry, locked breakeven+). CMP 7049 vs SL 6960 = 1.3% gap, meets trail-gap floor. Strong Q4 (rev +34%, EBITDA +80%), multiple broker buys, Chemours catalyst June/July. Hold thesis intact — values unchanged so this is effectively HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 836.00,
      "new_target": 900.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 845.20 vs entry 838 = +0.9%. SL 836 ~1% below CMP — within tolerance. Capital goods leader +9.84% today on rail/defence theme. Holding values unchanged; HOLD via position_actions."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 365.00,
      "new_target": 388.00,
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 368.70 vs entry 369 = -0.1% (essentially flat, fresh 52w high zone). SL 365 ~1% below CMP — proper trail-gap. Q4 PAT +30% YoY, lending +32%, ATM. Keeping current levels; effectively HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 815.00,
      "new_target": 860.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 822.55 vs entry 820 = +0.3% (fresh ATH 843.15 today). SL 815 ~0.9% below CMP — at the lower edge of trail-gap discipline but post fresh ATH it's reasonable. Q4 +22% rev, MOFSL TP 950. Holding values unchanged; HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1253.00,
      "new_target": 1330.00,
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 1279.10 vs entry 1259 = +1.6% (intraday +11%). SL 1253 (~2% below CMP) appropriate. Blockbuster Q4, $1.75B order book. Holding values unchanged; HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 2990.00,
      "new_target": 3225.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 3034 vs entry 3025 = +0.3% (intraday +9.2%). SL 2990 ~1.5% below CMP — proper trail-gap. Q4 strong, defence shipbuilding theme intact. Holding values unchanged; HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 800.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 807.30 vs entry 806 = +0.2% (intraday +10.46%). SL 800 ~0.9% below CMP — at the lower edge of trail-gap floor but acceptable given low ATR on the name. Q4 record revenue, FY27 guidance positive. Holding values unchanged; HOLD."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1035 already above entry 984 (+5% locked), gap to CMP 1056.70 is ~2%. Proper trail. No change needed — will reassess if price clears 1080."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge, marginal P&L. SL 121 appropriate. Hold for portfolio diversification."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1735.00,
      "reasoning": "Position +3.4%; trailing SL from 1725 to 1735 (above entry 1700, ~1.25% below CMP 1757). Locks +2% gain while leaving room for normal chop. Governance overhang noted but Q4 strength dominates near-term tape."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 4575.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail to breakeven (entry 4575). Q4 board meeting May 14 — outside 3-session window today but will require either exit or further tightening by May 12. Flagging for next-tick reassessment."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 6960 above entry 6900 — already locked. CMP 7049 gives 1.3% gap. Strong Q4, multiple catalysts. Hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Just entered today, +0.9%. SL 836 effectively at entry. Q4 results pending — monitor for binary timing announcement."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Flat from entry, fresh ATH zone. SL 365 proper. Strong Q4, ECLGS tailwind. Hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Just entered, fresh ATH 843. SL 815 at ~0.9% gap — tight but acceptable for low-vol FMCG. Hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Just entered post-results breakout. SL 1253 ~2% below CMP. Hold thesis."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Just entered, +0.3%. SL 2990 ~1.5% below CMP. Defence theme intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Just entered, +0.2%. SL 800 tight but proportionate to RTA's low-vol profile."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "VEDL post-demerger price discovery period — wait for new entity listings mid-June before sizing. LAURUSLABS at ATH with Q4 strong but stock extended +6% on results day; buying chases momentum. CHOLAHLDNG has Cobrapost governance overhang AND May 8 results binary — clear NO_ACTION per Rule 13. BHARATFORG board meeting today — binary event, NO new entry. HDFCBANK SBIN-results binary tomorrow — wait. BAJAJ-AUTO inside Day-10 cooldown window — no re-entry. HINDPETRO/AUROPHARMA/LUPIN/POLYCAB/M&M/SRF/NEULANDLAB/DABUR/GABRIEL — none clear the bar today: book is already fully deployed at 11 names, deployed % near max, and adding a 12th into a tape that's already extended would dilute risk-adjusted edge.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book fully deployed across 11 CNC names (deployed ~80% per soft target). All names showing positive intraday moves on a broadly bullish tape. Priority is locking in gains via trailing SLs (done on ADANIPORTS, HAL) and managing the HAL binary event (May 14 results, 5 sessions out — must decide trim/tighten by May 12). HFCL pending MIS BUY @ 133.50 from prior session is stale (1857m ago = >24h, should already have expired/been cancelled by engine but flagging for hygiene). No new entries today — every qualifying name is either already held, has binary event in 0-3 sessions (BHARATFORG, CHOLAHLDNG, HDFCBANK), inside cooldown (BAJAJ-AUTO), or has governance overhang (CHOLAHLDNG). Cumulative -53.72% drawdown is severe; capital preservation dominates — let the held winners run on trailing SLs rather than chasing fresh extended breakouts. Win rate 14% on 5d data confirms the issue is entry quality, not exit discipline."
}
